commitMessage:
maintenance: refine maintenance card + Laylo section

- Title: lower brightness (0.72), larger (24px), moved closer to iframe
- Logo: matched opacity (0.72) and applied grayscale inner/outer glow on SVG (no container outline)
- Dither: fixed full-viewport on iOS (100dvh, fixed layer, overscrollBehavior none) to avoid black edges
- Iframe: reduced vertical space, tightened spacing, slight negative top margin; reliable SDK integration retained
- Card: margin-top set to 100px; preserve 60% opacity, top third positioning feel
